feat.name: Fighting Style: Anatomist [5.5e] (HB)
feat.text:
When you hit a creature with a melee or ranged weapon attack, and that creature has already taken damage during this combat encounter, you can add your Wisdom modifier to the damage dealt.
Source: The Barber by Sewage Orc

feat.name: Fighting Style: Guarded Stance [5.5e] (HB)
feat.text:
When you take the Dodge action on your turn, another creatures of your choice within 5 feet of you benefit from the Dodge action as if they had taken it themselves. This benefit lasts until the start of your next turn or until the creature moves more than 5 feet away from you.
Source: The Barber by Sewage Orc

feat.name: Fighting Style: Ligation [5.5e] (HB)
feat.text:
When a creature within 5 feet of you drops to 0 hit points, you can use your reaction to take the Help action and attempt to stabilize them. You have advantage on the Wisdom (Medicine) check to stabilize them.
Source: The Barber by Sewage Orc
